title: Pillager Queen Reforged
description: The unofficial  forge port of the orginal Pillager Queen mod
body:
• Everything is obtainable in survival mode. You can summon the Pillager Queen by participating in a high level pillager raid.

• As of right now, the Pillager Queen does not drop any new items. We've configured a high number of experience and special items to be dropped for now.

• Not currently fixing bugs or issues, as this is a concept.![Pillager Queen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb8ad62b6c4a8ff7dd174a1266441f8727513dc1.jpeg)
• Granted permission to upload from Github user Magispeller
